review_highlight: Thashnee Govender and Reshaun Jones for calling you a 'Sustainable Legend' and 'Knowledgeable Expert'.
usp: Eco-friendly concrete pools with Magnesium Mineral water systems.

call_script.hook: Hey Mark, I'm calling from AI Site Agency. We've been looking at your 4.8-star reputation in Brisbane and we built something to protect it.
call_script.gift: I've actually taken the liberty of building a full 'Eco Pools 2.0' preview for your business. It's a premium, long-form funnel that shows off your magnesium builds and makes you the obvious choice for high-end clients.
call_script.ask: I've already got it live as a demo. Can I send you the link via SMS so you can check it out from your phone?
call_script.bye: Awesome, sending it now to 1300 792 161. Talk soon, Mark.
